title: Dental Clinic Website
description: A modern dental clinic website built to provide patients with easy access to quality oral care services, appointment booking, treatment information, and a comfortable patient experience. With Basic captcha Map, and Contact Form

title: Dental Clinic Management System
description: A multi-tenant MERN application for managing dental clinic patients, appointments, and medical records. Features an interactive dental chart with FDI notation, role-based access (admin/staff), appointment scheduling, and complete data isolation per clinic.

title: Blog App
description: A modern blogging platform's frontend interface designed for both readers and content creators. Highlights the app's usability, design, and core features with a clean, responsive UI.

title: E-commerce App
description: MERN E-Commerce Platform featuring dynamic product catalog with filtering and sorting, real-time search, seamless cart updates, secure checkout, and a comprehensive admin dashboard with real-time analytics.

title: E-commerce API Documentation
description: Dynamic E-Commerce Workflow Management with dynamic routes for order processing, real-time inventory updates, and secure user authentication. Documented Backend API published publicly using Postman.

title: Job Tracker App
description: An intuitive platform designed to help job seekers efficiently manage their job applications in one centralized place. Features a clean dashboard, status tracking, and a RESTful API backend.

title: Job Tracker API
description: RESTful API providing comprehensive endpoints to manage and monitor job applications — create, update, retrieve, and delete records with status tracking.

title: Blog App API
description: Robust backend service to manage blog content — create, retrieve, update, and delete blog posts, manage user comments, and handle user authentication seamlessly.

title: Coffee Roasters Page
description: A beautifully designed static HTML page for a coffee roasting business, highlighting the company's story, roasting process, and product offerings.

title: Course Booking API
description: RESTful API for managing course enrollments — user registration, authentication, course creation, updates, archiving, activation, and student enrollment. Documented with Postman.

title: Course Booking App
description: A MERN-stack course enrollment system featuring user registration, authentication, and profile management. Authenticated users can create, update, archive, and activate courses.
